content: Just as the high school English writing workshop framework teaches students to build reflective habits around grammar, structure and narrative before revision, the autonomous Reflexion agent can integrate the structured three-step iterative feedback loop of Self-Refine to turn unstructured, retrospective memory-based reflection into targeted, incremental output improvement. This creates a hybrid agent framework that mirrors the progressive skill-building human learners use, rather than treating reflection as a one-off memory update.
